When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
And the earth discharges its burdensFootnote-1
And man says,Footnote-2 "What is [wrong] with it?" -
That Day, it will report its news
Because your Lord has inspired [i.e., commanded] it.
That Day, the people will departFootnote-3 separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
So whoever does an atom's weightFootnote-4 of good will see it,
And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
